   #[1]DuckDuckGo (Lite)


   DuckDuckGo


   pi extension site:github.com____________ Search

   [All Regions_____] [Any Time__]


   Next Page >


   1.  [2]A set of delightful extensions for Pi - GitHub
       A set of delightful extensions for Pi. Contribute to
   tmustier/pi-extensions development by creating an account on GitHub.
       github.com/tmustier/pi-extensions     2026-01-06T15:42:00.0000000

   2.  [3]GitHub - rytswd/pi-agent-extensions
       pi-agent-extensions is a collection of pi coding agent extensions
   that enhance the development experience. Each extension is a standalone
   TypeScript file that plugs into pi's extension system.These extensions
   are configured for global auto-discovery and loaded on every pi
   session. By default, pi's extension system enables all the extensions.
       github.com/rytswd/pi-agent-extensions

   3.  [4]GitHub - pi-packages/tmustier-pi-extensions: A set of delightful
   ...
       A set of delightful extensions for Pi. Contribute to
   pi-packages/tmustier-pi-extensions development by creating an account
   on GitHub.
       github.com/pi-packages/tmustier-pi-extensions

   4.  [5]pi-extensions/extending-pi at main · tmustier/pi-extensions ·
   GitHub
       Guide for extending Pi — decide between Agent Skills, extensions,
   prompt templates, themes, context files, custom models/providers, and
   Pi packages, then create and package them. The skill emphasizes Pi's
   extension-first architecture: when changing Pi behavior, inspect the
   extension docs, examples, and installed types/source before considering
   a Pi internal patch. Includes nested Agent ...
       github.com/tmustier/pi-extensions/tree/main/extending-pi

   5.  [6]GitHub - qualisero/awesome-pi-agent: Awesome list of add-ons,
   hooks ...
       Awesome list of add-ons, hooks, tools, skills, and resources for
   the pi coding agent (pi-mono). - qualisero/awesome-pi-agent
       github.com/qualisero/awesome-pi-agent
   2026-01-05T00:00:00.0000000

   6.  [7]GitHub - nicobailon/pi-subagents: Pi extension for async
   subagent ...
       Pi extension for async subagent delegation with truncation,
   artifacts, and session sharing - nicobailon/pi-subagents
       github.com/nicobailon/pi-subagents

   7.  [8]Extensions, skills, and themes for Pi coding agent - GitHub
       A collection of extensions, skills, and themes for Pi, the AI
   coding agent for the terminal. Extensions cover everything from UI
   polish (custom footer, tool pills, leader-key palette) to deep workflow
   tooling (semantic git review, session archiving, context handoff
   between sessions, cmux integration).
       github.com/tomsej/pi-ext     2026-02-23T20:43:00.0000000

   8.  [9]GitHub - MattDevy/pi-extensions: A set of pi-extensions,
   including pi ...
       A set of pi-extensions, including pi-continuous-learning that
   continually improves you pi coding agent experience -
   MattDevy/pi-extensions
       github.com/MattDevy/pi-extensions

   9.  [10]GitHub - jmcombs/pi-extensions: A monorepo of high-quality
   extensions ...
       A monorepo of high-quality extensions for the Pi coding agent.
   Every package here is a Pi extension that can be installed individually
   from npm. Packages are tagged with the pi-package keyword so they
   appear in the pi.dev gallery.
       github.com/jmcombs/pi-extensions

   10.  [11]pi-extension · GitHub Topics · GitHub
       A pi extension that brings Claude Code-style task tracking and
   coordination to pi. Track multi-step work with structured tasks,
   dependency management, and a persistent visual widget.
       github.com/topics/pi-extension


   Next Page >


   pi extension site:github.com____________ Search
